note:
在另一个世界里，索尼爱立信2011年发布的Xperia Play取得了巨大的成功。在这个世界里，今天很大一部分手机游戏都是在类似的后续设备上玩的，包括从屏幕下方滑出的物理按钮和数字键盘。
今天，我们通过最近泄露的照片对这个宇宙有一个简短的一瞥，这些照片似乎是计划中的Xperia Play 2的原型。
上面的照片(在索尼Xperia subreddit上发现的)来自中国淘宝平台上的一家经销商，该平台专门从事新商品和二手商品的个人对个人销售。ARS不能独立验证这些图片的真实性，但它们确实与2012年泄露的Xperia Play 2的概念艺术有些一致。
该设备触摸屏一侧的盒式设计和电容式按钮也与大约在同一时间发布的Xperia系列中的其他手机排成一排。淘宝卖家的其他物品还包括一些其他难找的老技术，比如PS3开发套件。如果这是赝品，那就是精心制作的。
Play 2原型上最耐人寻味的变化是在这款设备的中心附近有一个标有3D&34；的按钮。这可能意味着索尼正在计划自己的免眼镜立体显示器，类似于任天堂3DS，这早在2010年就占据了新闻头条。考虑到索尼在Xperia Play 2上可以访问的经典原创PlayStation游戏库，3D显示屏对索尼可能特别有吸引力。
否则，原型上的PlayStation样式的控件看起来与原始Xperia Play上的控件完全相似。像“开始”(Start)和“选择”(Select)这样的附带按钮已经从角落移到了中心(现在当设备打开时，这些按钮就会亮起来)，这些按钮本身也呈现出橙色的样式，每边都有一个鲜明的橙色圆圈。肩部按钮看起来也比最初的Xperia Play略薄一些，它与设备背面一起弯曲，而不是伸出一个扩大的手指休息区。
正如Ars在我们当时的评论中指出的那样，最初的Xperia Play受到了一些影响，原因是缺乏兼容的软件，屏幕昏暗，以及一些动力不足的内部部件。然而，回首过去，很容易看到它的外形因素领先于它的时代。今天，像Razer Kishi和为标准控制台控制器设计的手机/控制器套这样的卡扣式设备，迎合了想要玩各种支持物理控制的手机游戏的观众。如今，这也包括XCloud和Stadia等公司的手机游戏流媒体选项，这些选项是为手机设计的，考虑到了按钮和模拟棒。
到2012年，索尼已经从基于按钮的手机游戏转向PlayStation Vita，这最终成为了它自己在便携式游戏领域的死胡同。但就在今天，当我们看着这些原型图片时，让我们一起想象一下另一个世界，在那里，带有PlayStation控件的智能手机成为进入另一个未来的主要新方式。
note_en:
There is an alternate universe where  Sony Ericsson's 2011 release of the Xperia Play was a huge success. In that universe, a substantial portion of today's mobile games are played on similar successor devices, complete with physical buttons and d-pads that slide out from underneath the screen.
 Today, we get a brief glimpse into that universe via late leaked photos of what seems to be a prototype of a planned Xperia Play 2.
 The above photos (as  discovered on the Sony Xperia subreddit) originate from  a reseller on China's Taobao platform, which specializes in person-to-person sales of new and used goods. Ars can't independently verify the authenticity of the images, but they do line up somewhat with concept art for the Xperia Play 2  that leaked in 2012.
 The boxier design and capacitive buttons on the touchscreen side of the device also line up with  other phones in the Xperia line released around the same time. And the Taobao seller's other listings include a number of other hard-to-find pieces of older technology, such as a PS3 developer kit. If this is a fake, it's an elaborate one.
  The most intriguing change on the Play 2 prototype is a button labeled "3D" near the center of this device. That could signify that Sony was planning its own glasses-free stereoscopic display akin to the Nintendo 3DS, which was  grabbing headlines as early as 2010. A 3D display may have been especially attractive to Sony given the library of classic original PlayStation titles that the company had access to for the Xperia Play 2.
 Otherwise, the PlayStation-styled controls on the prototype look altogether similar to those on the original Xperia Play. Incidental buttons like Start and Select have been moved from the corners to the center (and now light up when the device is on), and the buttons themselves have taken on an orange styling, with a stark orange circle around each side. The shoulder buttons also look a bit thinner than those on the original Xperia Play, bending around with the back of the device rather than jutting out with an expanded finger rest area.
 As Ars noted  in our review at the time, the original Xperia Play suffered a bit from a lack of compatible software, a dim screen, and some underpowered internals for the price. Looking back, though, it's easy to see its form factor as ahead of its time. Today, snap-on devices like  the Razer Kishi and  phone/controller holsters designed for standard console controllers cater to an audience that wants to play  a wide variety of mobile games with support for physical controls. These days, that includes mobile game streaming options from the likes of xCloud and Stadia as well, which have been designed for mobile phones with buttons and analog sticks in mind.
 By 2012, Sony had pivoted away from button-based phone gaming to  the PlayStation Vita, which ended up  being its own dead-end in the world of portable gaming. But just for today, as we look at these prototype images, let's all imagine that alternate universe where smartphones with PlayStation controls became a major new way to play well into the alternate future.
title: 明显的原型照片显示索尼的罐装“PlayStation Phone”后续产品
title_en: Apparent prototype photos show Sony’s canned “PlayStation phone” followup

对于Xbox来说，这是忙碌的一周。周一，微软确认收购了Bethesda和ZeniMax游戏开发家族，以推动Xbox生态系统的发展。周二，该公司启动了今年11月Xbox Series X和Xbox Series S的预订。
今天，微软推出了我们自己的非终极版X系列，更胜一筹--我已经立即开始测试它。
正如上面的画廊所示，Ars Technica从位于华盛顿州雷蒙德的微软总部收到了一个包裹，其中包括一台非最终版的Xbox Series X游戏机、全新的Xbox游戏板和一块1TB的存储扩展卡，这些卡是根据Xbox Velocity架构规范建造的，由希捷制造。除了一根HDMI 2.1数据线和一根电源线，这个盒子里什么也没有。
微软在严酷的条件下给我们寄来了这个包，最大的问题是，到今天为止，除了向您展示照片之外，我们不能预览或描述上述任何内容。你可能有很多关于他们的问题。我的同事们肯定是这么做的，包裹一到，ARS员工聊天活动的爆炸性增长就证明了这一点。
现在，我可以指出之前的报道来跟上你的进度，因为你的一些全新的问题可能已经有了答案：
Xbox Velocity Architecture的数据传输标准旨在统一X系列和S系列的下一代性能，这意味着您的下一代Xbox上本地安装的任何游戏都必须安装在NVMe 4.0级别的驱动器上。如果您希望扩展任何一个系统的内置存储容量(X系列为1TB，S系列为512 GB)，您将需要购买专有的NVMe 4.0级扩展卡。上面画廊中的卡片是此前披露的希捷制造的1TB机型。我们还不知道这张卡的定价，也不知道是否有其他制造商在车上生产和销售类似的驱动器。
微软此前已确认，通过USB Type-A3.1接口连接的外部驱动器将与两种Xbox系列机型兼容。这些只能启动前几代软件，系列游戏可以存储在较旧的外部驱动器上，但在移回系统的NVMe驱动器之前，它们不会启动。微软还没有公开确认装载在旧硬盘上的经典游戏与装载在NVMe 4.0驱动器上的相同游戏相比会有什么不同，但至少微软已经向粉丝保证，他们的旧Xbox One附加驱动器是兼容的(并将在内置驱动器上留出宝贵的空间)。
除了新的专有扩展卡端口外，X系列的端口还包括以下端口：三个USBA3.1类型端口、一个HDMI2.1端口和一个以太网端口，额定值为802.3 10/100/1000。与所有Xbox One机型不同的是，X系列和S系列跳过了与机顶盒配合使用的HDMI-out端口。在无线功能方面，Xbox系列X支持802.3 Wi-Fi连接和双频Xbox无线协议。
今年8月，一些消费者手中拿到了一款白色版本的温和升级的Xbox游戏手柄。当X系列在2019年末出现时，我们已经看到了控制器，特别是它的新共享按钮，但对共享功能的印象还没有泄露。更新的D-Pad现在的角部有额外的塑料边框，风格类似于Xbox Elite。8月份的泄密者之一称，这是新控制器[他]最喜欢的部件之一。
2020年3月，Digital Foundry的理查德·利德贝特(Richard LeadBetter)解释了X系列的一系列通风点-以及通风点正下方的风扇-是如何融入新游戏机的冷却系统的：
空气从底部泵入，通过系统...。在个人电脑中，气流不仅仅是由进气口和出气口来定义的，可以这么说。你想要里面有物理空间。但这里面什么都没有。它是密闭的。所有的东西都经过设计，而且都装在里面了。然后(空气)到达顶部，到达一个直径130毫米的风扇，然后直接从顶部出来。我们也有[X系列]在它的一边，[气流]似乎在外面工作得很好。
上周，两款新的Xbox系列机型都推出了空壳显示版，以挑选出版商，微软在会上确认了X系列设计的一个细节：默认情况下，X系列一侧的圆形底座是不能拆卸的，这一点微软公司(Microsoft)确认了X系列设计的一个细节：在默认情况下，底座一侧的圆形是不能拆卸的。
最后，X系列正面的光驱支持4K超高清蓝光，这是它与Xbox One X和Xbox One S的共同之处。它还与现有的Xbox、Xbox 360和Xbox One光盘兼容，将旧的兼容游戏装入X系列光驱将提示您将某种形式的文件下载到系统的本地存储。另一方面，这在X系列上到底是如何发挥作用的，还有待观察。
如果您在看完此硬件后还有其他问题，我们有5%的机会向您推荐其他现有信息或覆盖范围来回答这些问题。否则，如果我们不回复，请不要着急。我们正在听。一旦我们被允许告诉你更多(日期我们还不能公开确认)，我们就会告诉你。
现在，我拿着所有重达9.8磅的Xbox Series X，厚颜无耻地瞥了一眼我。
欢迎，@Xbox已经走了，早早地给我发了一个#XboxSeriesX。更多(但不会太多)，请立即发送电子邮件至@ArsTechnica：https://t.co/2TVg3YIl3V pic.twitter.com/z9S48qACHa
-萨姆·马奇科维奇·萨姆雷德(@☂)2020年9月23日
note_en:
It's a  busy week for all things Xbox. On Monday, Microsoft confirmed  its acquisition of the Bethesda and ZeniMax game-dev family to  fuel the Xbox ecosystem going forward. On Tuesday, the company  launched preorders for  this November's Xbox Series X and Xbox Series S.
 And today, Microsoft topped all of that off by shipping us a "non-final" Series X of our own—and I have immediately begun testing it.
    As the above gallery shows, Ars Technica received a package from Microsoft's headquarters in Redmond, Washington, containing a "non-final" Xbox Series X console, the brand-new Xbox gamepad, and a 1TB "storage expansion" card, as built to the Xbox Velocity Architecture spec and made by Seagate. Nothing else came in this box (besides an HDMI 2.1 cable and a power cord, anyway).
 Microsoft sent us this package under severe conditions, and the biggest is that, as of today, we cannot preview or describe any of the above contents beyond showing you photos. You likely have a lot of questions about them. My colleagues sure did, as evidenced by the explosion in Ars staff-chat activity as soon as the package arrived.
  For now, I can point to prior coverage to catch you up, since some of your brand-new questions may already have answers:
 The data-transfer standard of  Xbox Velocity Architecture is meant to unify "next-gen performance" across Series X and Series S, which means any locally installed games on your next-gen Xbox must be installed on an NVMe 4.0-rated drive. Should you wish to expand either system's built-in storage capacity (1TB for Series X, 512GB for Series S), you'll need to purchase  a proprietary NVMe 4.0-rated expansion card. The card in the above gallery is the previously revealed 1TB model made by Seagate. We do not yet know pricing for this card or if other manufacturers are on board to produce and sell similar drives.
 Microsoft has previously confirmed that external drives connected via USB Type-A 3.1 connections will be compatible with both Xbox Series models. These will only boot previous generations' software; Series-gen games can be stored on older, external drives, but they won't boot until moved back to the system's NVMe drives. Microsoft has not yet publicly confirmed how classic games loaded on older drives will compare to the same games loaded on NVMe 4.0 drives, but at the very least, Microsoft has assured fans that their older Xbox One add-on drives are compatible (and will leave precious space open on the built-in drive).
 In addition to the new, proprietary "expansion card" port, Series X's ports include the following: three USB Type-A 3.1 ports; one HDMI 2.1 port; and one Ethernet port, rated 802.3 10/100/1000. Unlike all Xbox One models, Series X and S skip the "HDMI-out" port that worked with set-top boxes. In terms of wireless features, Xbox Series X supports 802.3 Wi-Fi connectivity and the dual-band Xbox Wireless protocol.
     In August, a white version of  the mildly updated Xbox gamepad landed in some consumers' hands. We'd already seen the controller when  Series X emerged in late 2019, particularly its new "share" button, but impressions of the share functionality have yet to leak. The updated d-pad, which now has additional plastic framing around its corners in a style resembling the  Xbox Elite, was described by one of the August leakers as "one of [his] favorite parts" of the new controller.
 In March 2020, Digital Foundry's Richard Leadbetter explained how Series X's array of ventilation dots—and fans directly beneath them—figure into  the new console's cooling system:
 Air gets pumped in from the bottom, goes through the system... in a PC, airflow isn't just defined by having inlets and outputs so to speak. You want physical air space in it. But there's  nothing in this. It's airtight. Everything goes through the design, and it's packed in there. Then [air] reaches the top to a 130mm diameter fan and goes straight out of the top. We also had [Series X] on its side, [airflow] seemed to work just fine going out there.
 Empty shell "display" versions of both new Xbox Series models went out to select members of the press last week, at which point  Microsoft confirmed one detail about the Series X design: the round "base" on one of its sides is not removable by default.
 Last of all, the disc drive on the front of Series X supports 4K UHD Blu-Ray, which it has in common with Xbox One X  and Xbox One S. It's also compatible with existing Xbox, Xbox 360, and Xbox One discs, and loading older, compatible games into the Series X disc drive will prompt some form of file download to your system's local storage. How  exactly that works on Series X, on the other hand, has yet to be seen.
  If you have additional questions after seeing this hardware, there's a 5-percent chance we can point you to other existing information or coverage to answer them. Otherwise, if we don't reply, please do not fret. We're listening. And as soon as we're allowed to tell you more (on dates we can't publicly confirm just yet), we will.
 For now, here's a cheeky peek at me holding all 9.8lbs of the Xbox Series X.
 Welp,  @xbox done gone and sent me an early  #XboxSeriesX.  More (but not much more) at  @arstechnica right now:  https://t.co/2TVg3YIl3V  pic.twitter.com/z9S48qACHa
— Sam Machkovech ☂ (@samred)  September 23, 2020
title: 我们有一台可以正常工作的Xbox系列X
title_en: We are in possession of a working Xbox Series X

note:
该公司将于9月30日(星期三)开始交易，股票代码为PLTR。Palantir原本计划今天开始交易，但在几份文件前将日期推迟到了29日，最终以30日结束。它不是在发行新股，尽管该公司早在7月份就有效地从非公开市场筹集了约10亿美元的“首次公开募股(IPO)资金”。
Palantir昨天还提供了收入指引，以填写其日历年剩余时间。该公司估计，2020年的目标营收约为10.5亿美元，非GAAP营业收入(不包括基于股票的薪酬和其他一些主要项目)为1.16亿-1.26亿美元。该公司预计其员工人数将大致持平，仅增长4%。
根据Palantir提交的S-1文件，2018年和2019年的收入分别为5.95亿美元和7.43亿美元。如果达到新的收入目标，这将比去年增长41%，比前一年约25%的增长率有所加快。根据该公司的预测，该公司第三季度的收入预计将达到2.78亿至2.8亿美元，增长率为46%至47%。因此，随着客户可能在全球大流行后开始加大IT购买力度，今年下半年似乎每隔一段时间就会略有加快。
虽然我们已经广泛讨论了Palantir在治理方面的困境，但该公司背后的现实是相当不错的：它是一家快速增长的公司，如果不是快速增长的话，主要是在软件而不是服务领域，客户群不断增长，包括政府和企业客户。该公司最近开始更多地谈论其阿波罗(Apollo)产品，这有助于它缩短销售时间，并使其产品更多地实现自助服务，或者至少是减少服务。
不过，为了进行比较，看看Snowflake，它也在数据基础设施领域，尽管在堆栈中略低一些，上周刚刚上市。在2018年的大部分时间里(该公司有2月1日的会计日历)，该公司创造了9700万美元的收入，然后在2019年的大部分时间里增长到了惊人的2.65亿美元。Snowflake的净亏损为营收的131%，而Palantir去年的净亏损为营收的78%。
雪花被认为是今年最好的IPO之一，因为它的净美元保留率很高，增长非常快，而且巨大的市场规模等待开发。就收入而言，Palantir是一家规模大得多的公司，但增长速度明显放缓，但现金流状况略有改善，特别是在过去两年，因为它提高了运营效率。
我们将不得不等待一周，看看市场的反应。不过，就目前而言，Palantir似乎已经走出了自己的道路，终于可以开始交易了。
note_en:
The company will  begin trading on Wednesday, September 30th, under the ticker PLTR. Palantir originally had planned to start trading today, but moved the date back to the 29th a few filings ago, and finally ended up with the 30th. It is not floating new stock, although the company effectively raised “IPO money”  back in July of about $1 billion from the private markets.
 Palantir yesterday also offered revenue guidance to fill out the rest of its calendar year. The company estimated it would target roughly $1.05 billion in revenue for 2020, with non-GAAP operating income (excluding stock-based compensation and some other major line items) of $116-126 million. It expects its head count to remain roughly flat, growing just 4%.
  Palantir had revenue of $595 million in 2018 and $743 million in 2019 according to its S-1 filing. If it hits its new target revenue, that would be a growth rate of 41% from last year, an acceleration from the roughly 25% growth rate in the previous year. The company’s Q3 revenue is estimated to reach $278-280 million with a growth rate of 46-47%, according to the company’s projections. So it seems to be accelerating every so slightly in the back half of this year as customers presumably start ramping up their IT purchases following the global pandemic.
 While we have talked  extensively about Palantir’s woes on governance, the reality behind the company is reasonably decent: it’s a quick if not rapid growth company, predominantly in software rather than services, with a growing customer base including both government and enterprise customers. The company has very recently started to talk more about  its Apollo product, which has helped it cut sales times and make more of its product self-service, or at least, reduced-service.
 For comparison though, check out Snowflake, which is also in the data infrastructure space although a bit lower in the stack and  just went public last week. In most of 2018 (the company has a Feb 1 fiscal calendar), the company generated $97 million in revenue, and then grew to an astonishing $265 million for most of 2019. Snowflake had a net loss of 131% of revenue, compared to Palantir, which had a net loss of 78% of revenue last year.
 Snowflake was considered one of the best  IPOs   of the year, given its high net dollar retention rate, extremely rapid growth, and huge market size waiting to be tapped. Palantir is a much larger company in terms of revenues, but growing significantly slower, but with a bit better cash flow position, particularly in the last two years as it has made its operations much more efficient.
 We’ll have to wait a week to see how the markets react. For now though, it looks like Palantir has gotten out of its own way and can finally start trading.
title: Palantir发布2020年收入指引10.5亿美元，将于9月30日开始交易
title_en: Palantir publishes 2020 revenue guidance of $1.05B, will trade starting Sept 30th

note:
这是令人震惊的资本创始人亚当·斯特克所称的愿景的一部分，即让洛杉矶成为“拯救世界的领先创新中心”。
Strike Capital目前正从5500万美元的第二只基金中进行投资，该公司不愿透露迪卡普里奥所持股份的规模，但表示这笔投资规模很大。
迪卡普里奥在一份声明中说：“洛杉矶拥有无与伦比的创造和创新精神，我很高兴能在我的家乡投资下一代企业家和商界领袖。”
迪卡普里奥已经对初创公司进行了一些投资，这些公司为这位奥斯卡获奖演员做得非常好。两项投资，床垫零售商Casper和肉类替代品制造商Beyond Meat，现在都是上市公司。事实上，Beyond Meat是去年表现最好的公开募股之一。
据CrunchBase称，这两笔投资突出了消费者创新和可持续发展的主题，这些主题贯穿了迪卡普里奥公开的创业承诺。其他投资包括实验室培育的钻石制造商钻石铸造公司(Diamond Foundry)；促进可持续热带雨林保护的茶叶公司鲁纳茶(Runa Tea)；回收技术开发商Rubicon；可持续用餐准备公司Love the Wild；以及自称艺术沙扎姆(Shazam)的应用程序Magnus。迪卡普里奥也是总部位于洛杉矶的专注于道德和可持续发展的金融服务公司Exption的投资者。
“他认为这是支持洛杉矶的一种方式，”斯特克在谈到迪卡普里奥的承诺时说。
除了对该基金的承诺外，迪卡普里奥还将与Strike Capital团队一起进行共同投资。事实上，这位演员已经投资了猛禽地图(Raptor Maps)，这是一家使用无人机分析太阳能发电场生产率和运营的公司。
斯克雷克说：“他选择我们是因为他已经很欣赏我们的授权了。”尽管该公司在设计上可能不是一家影响投资基金，但斯特雷克表示，该公司的交易重点是金融包容性、可持续性和技术创新，作为第一个原则。
“我认为，从根本上说，如果一家企业是以使命为导向的，他们最有可能获得更高的企业价值，留住更多的人才，”斯特雷克说。
Strike现在是洛杉矶第四大专用种子基金，管理着近1.5亿美元的资产。其投资组合公司包括：Sendoso、ScratchPay、Mythical Games和Brainbase，并已投资和退出了一些后期公司，如Mojo Vision、Postmate、Nutanix、Latch、Grab和WunderMobility。
迪卡普里奥在一份声明中说：“与Strike Capital的团队一起，我们正在创建一个社区，在那里，洛杉矶的下一代领导人可以发展他们的业务，相互学习，实现他们的愿景，并改善我们的世界。”
note_en:
It’s part of what  Struck Capital   founder Adam Struck called a vision of making Los Angeles “a leading hub for innovation to save the world.”
 Struck Capital, which is currently investing out of a $55 million second fund, would not disclose the size of DiCaprio’s stake, but said that the investment is significant.
  “Los Angeles has a creative and innovative spirit like nowhere else, and I’m excited to be investing in the next generation of entrepreneurs and business leaders in my hometown,” said DiCaprio, in a statement.
 DiCaprio has already made a number of investments in startup companies that have done very well for the Academy Award-winning actor. Two investments, the mattress retailer  Casper   and the meat alternative manufacturer,  Beyond Meat,   are now both publicly traded companies. In fact, Beyond Meat was one of the best performing public offerings of the last year.
 And the two investments highlight themes of consumer innovation and sustainability that are a through-line across the startup commitments DiCaprio has made public,  according to CrunchBase. Other investments include the lab grown diamond manufacturer, Diamond Foundry; the tea company promoting sustainable rainforest preservation, Runa Tea; recycling technology developer, Rubicon; the sustainable meal prep company, Love The Wild; and Magnus, an app that bills itself as a Shazam for art. DiCaprio is also investor in the Los Angeles-based ethically and sustainably focused financial services firm, Aspiration.
 “He sees this as a way to support LA,” said Struck of DiCaprio’s commitment.
 In addition to his commitment to the fund, DiCaprio will be making co-investments alongside the Struck Capital team. In fact, the actor has already investment in  Raptor Maps,   a company that uses drones to analyze the productivity and operations of solar farms.
 “He chose us because he already appreciates our mandate,” said Struck. And while the firm may not be an impact investment fund by design, Struck said the company’s deals focus on financial inclusion, sustainability, and technological innovation as first principals.
 “I think, fundamentally, if a business is mission driven, they’re most likely going to acquire higher enterprise values and retain more talent,” Struck said.
 Struck is now the fourth largest dedicated seed fund in Los Angeles, and has nearly $150 million in assets under management. Its portfolio companies include:  Sendoso,   ScratchPay, Mythical Games, and  Brainbase   and has backed and exited a number of later stage companies like Mojo Vision, Postmates, Nutanix, Latch, Grab, and Wunder Mobility.
 “Alongside the team at Struck Capital we’re creating a community, where the next generation of LA’s leaders can grow their business, learn from one another, achieve their visions, and improve our world,” DiCaprio said in a statement.
title: 莱昂纳多·迪卡普里奥入股Strike Capital，为洛杉矶科技生态系统的未来提供资金
title_en: Leonardo DiCaprio takes a stake in Struck Capital to fund the future of LA’s tech ecosystem

note:
TikTok帮助普及了这段15秒的短视频-这是它的默认设置。但它的应用程序也允许视频时长不超过一分钟，这是一个很受欢迎的选择。然而，推出的卷轴只支持15秒的视频。不出所料，Reels的早期采用者社区一直在要求能够制作更长的视频，类似于TikTok。
但Instagram并没有给他们整整一分钟的时间。取而代之的是，它增加了创建长达30秒的卷轴的能力。这可能会迫使用户为Reels创建原创内容，而不是在Instagram上重新调整他们较长的TikTok视频的用途。
该公司表示，现在还将允许用户将计时器延长至10秒，并将允许用户裁剪和删除剪辑，以使编辑变得更简单。
“我们继续根据人们的反馈改进Reels，这些更新使创建和编辑变得更容易。虽然现在还为时尚早，但我们看到了很多娱乐性、创造性的内容，“Instagram Reels总监泰莎·莱昂斯-莱恩(Tessa Lyons-Laing)说。
对视频创作和编辑过程的调整可能有助于简化一些更麻烦的痛点，但并不能完全解决Reels面临的问题。
TikTok如此容易使用的原因是，你不需要是一个优秀的视频编辑，就可以制作出看起来相当精致的短视频与音乐同步。例如，有了TikTok的声音同步功能，如果你不想完全控制编辑体验，这款应用可以自动找到与你的视频片段同步的音乐。
在Reels上，有更多的手动编辑涉及到定位正确的音乐并将其与您的编辑相匹配-这是您必须自己做的，而不是让技术人员为您做。
尽管Reels无耻地试图成为TikTok的克隆，但它缺乏其他TikTok功能，比如二重唱或“家庭配对”的父母控制。这也使得如何更私密地分享视频变得困难。卷轴可以发布到故事中，在那里它们会消失，或者它们可以出现在你的个人资料中，出现在它们自己的选项卡中-这是一个令人困惑的设计选择。此外，将Reels集成到Instagram应用程序中也会导致应用程序膨胀。TikTok是一个完整的社交网络，但Reels正试图将这种更广泛的创意体验与故事、购物、直播视频、IGTV以及更标准的照片和视频发布等其他功能一起压缩到一个小得多的盒子里。感觉太多了。
这就是说，Reels已经成功地吸引了一批高调的用户。今天，它正在兜售来自比利·波特、布莱尔·伊玛尼、哈巴狗道格、威廉王子和凯特以及伊坦·伯纳特等创作者的顶级卷轴作为其创意内容的例子。
尽管TikTok在美国的命运仍然是个大问号，但目前还不清楚Instagram是否准备好在禁令的情况下吸收TikTok的观众。
Instagram表示，创建30秒卷轴的选项将于今天推出，而新的裁剪和编辑功能现在已经上线。计时器延期也将在未来几天内推出。
随着Reels向新市场的扩张，这些功能将在全球50个可用Reels的国家和其他地方可用。
note_en:
TikTok helped popularize the short, 15-second video — its default setting. But its app also allows videos up to a minute in length, which is a popular option. Reels, however, launched with support for only the 15-second video. Not surprisingly, the Reels community of early adopters has been asking for the ability to create longer videos, similar to TikTok.
 But Instagram isn’t giving them the full one minute. Instead, it’s adding the ability to create a Reel up to 30 seconds long. This could force users to create original content for Reels, instead of repurposing their longer TikTok videos on Instagram.
   The company says it will also now allow users to extend the timer up to 10 seconds and will allow users to trim and delete clips to make editing simpler.
 “We continue to improve Reels based on people’s feedback, and these updates make it easier to create and edit. While it’s still early, we’re seeing a lot of entertaining, creative content,” said Instagram Reels Director, Tessa Lyons-Laing.
 The tweaks to the video creation and editing process could help to simplify some of the more troublesome pain points, but don’t fully address the problems facing Reels.
 What makes TikTok so easy to use is that you don’t have to be a great video editor to make what appear to be fairly polished, short-form videos synced to music. With TikTok’s Sound Sync feature, for example, the app can automatically find music that synchronizes with your video clips, if you don’t want to take full control of the editing experience.
 On Reels, there’s more manual editing involved in terms of locating the right music and matching it up with your edits — which you have to do yourself, instead of leaving it up to the tech to do for you.
  And despite being a shameless attempt at being a TikTok clone, Reels lacks other TikTok features, like duets or  its “Family Pairing” parental controls. It also makes it difficult to figure out how to share videos more privately. Reels can be posted to Stories, where they disappear, or they can appear on your profile in their own tab — which is a confusing design choice. Plus, the integration of Reels in the Instagram app  contributes to app bloat. TikTok is an entire social network, but Reels is trying to squeeze that broader creative experience into a much smaller box alongside so many other features, like Stories, Shopping, Live Video, IGTV, and more standard photo and video publishing. It feels like too much.
 That said, Reels has managed to onboard a number of high-profile users. Today, it’s touting top Reels from creators like  Billy Porter,  Blair Imani,  Doug the Pug,  Prince William and Kate, and  Eitan Bernath as examples of its creative content.
 Even though TikTok’s fate  is still a big question mark in the U.S., it’s not clear, at this point, if Instagram will be poised to absorb the TikTok audience in the event of a ban.
 Instagram says the option to create 30 second Reels is rolling out today, while the new trimming and editing features are live now. The Timer extension will also roll out in the next few days.
 The features will be available in the 50 countries worldwide where Reels is available and elsewhere, as Reels expands to new markets.
title: Instagram的TikTok克隆卷轴更新，允许更长的视频，更轻松的编辑
title_en: Instagram’s TikTok clone Reels updates to allow longer videos, easier edits

SideQuest的联合创始人沙恩·哈里斯(Shane Harris)就是这些开发者之一，但在他的应用程序被拒绝后，他开始着手制定解决办法。他和他的妻子奥拉(Orla)开始构建一个软件平台，可以绕过官僚作风，轻松地将应用程序侧面加载到Quest设备上，即使这款游戏在Facebook的商店里没有。用户不需要越狱设备就可以访问SideQuest，他们只需将耳机切换到“开发者模式”，这是一个简单的过程，Oculus多年来没有采取有意义的步骤来使其复杂化。这个平台很快就起飞了，给了开发者一个地方来测试他们自己的创作，给用户一个地方来演示那些比Facebook更手工打磨的应用程序商店更具试验性或更未完成的标题。
该平台的一些热门产品包括现有PC VR游戏的正在进行的Quest端口，全新的创作和Oculus Store游戏的附加组件，如流行的虚拟桌面应用程序。联合创始人奥拉·哈里斯(Orla Harris)表示，在过去的六个月里，该商店发布了800款新应用程序。
随着这款应用开始达到主要的使用里程碑，吸引了数十万月度访问者访问其网站，这对夫妇的联合创始人团队开始寻找一些资金来扩大他们的团队。他们位于贝尔法斯特的Duo最终选择加入BoostVC加速器参加其最新的课程，尽管距离很远，按标准条款筹集了50万美元。他们还收到了来自该基金的支票，特别是Oculus创始人帕尔默·勒基(Palmer Luckey)。该团队总共筹集了65万美元，并用这笔资金聘请了工程师、社区经理和设计师。
自离开Facebook以来，勒基作为天使投资者投资了几家VR初创公司。他表示，SideQuest的软件追随了他的团队在收购Facebook之前一直在开发的早期开发产品的脚步，并正在推动一个更开放的Oculus平台。勒基在一份声明中表示：“任何头盔制造商都不应该控制VR生态系统，或者单方面控制人们在VR头盔上运行的内容，当我看着Sidequest时，我看到了Oculus Share的精神。”
SideQuest已经尽了最大努力来赢得Facebook和Oculus的好感。
这意味着要遵守该公司的开发商条款，这无疑使他们的货币化道路变得复杂。联合创始人表示，大多数应用商店通过从付费应用的销售中收取一定比例的收入来赚钱，但这样做可能会招致Facebook的愤怒，使SideQuest团队主要依赖商店内部的付费促销作为收入的途径。他们指出，这条道路迫使他们在未来计划提供哪些服务方面发挥创意，但也让店面对赚取应用程序下载收入全额分成的开发者更具吸引力。
不断增长的广告收入让该公司做出了一些在用户中一直存在争议的决定，包括今年早些时候从商店中移除成人主题的应用程序。该团队测试提交给商店的所有内容，拒绝被认为是NSFW或侵犯版权的应用程序。SideQuest团队负责管理面向用户的店面中列出的应用程序，但该应用程序也可以用作将不是从商店下载的APK文件侧面加载到设备上的一种方式。
奥拉和沙恩·哈里斯表示，他们一直在努力与Facebook团队保持友好关系，但他们承认，这种良好的融洽关系对他们有很大的帮助，他们指出，Facebook阻止SideQuest开发Quest的任何行动都可能意味着游戏结束。
由于像苹果这样的公司因其单一的应用商店而引起监管机构的关注，在Facebook扩大VR努力的过程中，让一个业余市场在后台运营可能会为Facebook带来一些意想不到的长期好处。这家初创公司的创始人认为，他们的产品对各方来说都是一个积极的发展，他们指出，SideQuest为初出茅庐的VR开发者提供了一条改进演示并获得用户反馈的途径，这一过程在其他地方的发布前是不存在的。在我们的交谈中，Shane Harris自豪地指出，SideQuest商店中一款名为Cubism的流行益智应用程序最近“毕业”到了官方的Oculus商店，不过他很快就注意到，开发者也刚刚发布了另一款专为SideQuest开发的实验模式的游戏
note_en:
SideQuest co-founder Shane Harris was one of those developers, but after his app was rejected, he moved to craft a workaround. He and his wife Orla started building a software platform that could sidestep the bureaucracy and easily side-load apps onto the Quest device even if the title wasn’t available in Facebook’s store. Users didn’t need to jailbreak their device to access SideQuest, they simply need to switch their headset into a “developer mode,” a straightforward process that Oculus has not taken meaningful steps to complicate over the years. The platform quickly took off, giving developers a place to test their own creations and users a place to demo titles that were a bit experimental or a bit more unfinished than Facebook’s more hand-polished app store.
 Some of the platform’s hits include work-in-progress Quest ports of existing PC VR titles, wholly new creations and add-ons to Oculus Store titles like the popular Virtual Desktop app. Co-founder Orla Harris says that 800 new apps have been released on the store in the past six months.
  As the app began reaching major usage milestones, attracting hundreds of thousands of monthly visitors to its site, the husband-and-wife co-founding team began to seek out some cash to expand their team. They Belfast-based duo ended up opting to join the BoostVC accelerator for its latest class, albeit remotely, raising $500k per its standard terms. They also went on to receive checks from The Fund and, notably, Oculus founder Palmer Luckey. The team raised $650k in total and has used that funding to bring on engineers, a community manager and a designer.
  Luckey, who has backed a handful of VR startups as an angel investor since departing Facebook, said that SideQuest’s software followed in the footsteps of  early developer products that his team had been building out before the Facebook acquisition and was promoting a more open Oculus platform. “No HMD manufacturer should have a stranglehold on the VR ecosystem or unilateral control over what people run on their VR headsets, and when I look at Sidequest, I see the spirit of Oculus Share,” Luckey said in a statement.
 SideQuest has tried their best to stay in the good graces of Facebook and Oculus.
 That has meant abiding by the company’s developer terms which have admittedly complicated their monetization path. Most app stores make money by charging a percentage of revenues from sales of paid apps, but doing this would likely garner the ire of Facebook, the co-founders say, leaving the SideQuest team to mainly rely on paid promotion inside the store as a path towards revenues. They note that this path has forced them to get creative about what services they plan to offer down the road, but that it also has made the storefront more attractive to developers who are earning a full cut of app download revenues.
  Growing ad revenue has left the company to make some decisions that have been controversial with its users, including the removal of adult-themed apps from the store earlier this year. The team tests all content that is submitted to the store, rejecting apps that are deemed NSFW or violate copyright. The SideQuest team curates what apps are listed in the user-facing storefront, but the app can also be used as a means for side-loading APK files onto the device that aren’t downloaded from the store.
 Orla and Shane Harris say that they have worked to maintain a friendly relationship with the Facebook team, but acknowledge that they have an awful lot riding on that good rapport, noting that any move by Facebook to block SideQuest from working on the Quest would likely mean game-over.
 As companies like Apple attract regulatory attention due to their monolithic app storefronts, having a hobbyist marketplace operating in the background could offer some unforeseen long-term benefits for Facebook as they build out their VR efforts. The startup’s founders see their product as a positive development for all parties involved, noting that SideQuest offers budding VR developers a path to improving their demos and getting user feedback in a process that doesn’t exist elsewhere pre-release. During our conversation, Shane Harris proudly noted that a popular puzzle app in the SideQuest store called  Cubism had recently “graduated” to the official Oculus Store, though he was quick to note that the developer had also just released another experimental mode of the game just for SideQuest

揭幕仪式是虚拟的，但就在TechCrunch有机会近距离观看这辆车并体验只有新冠肺炎流行病才能提供的真正超现实和孤独的揭示的几天前。
ID.4在发布时将配备一个82千瓦时的电池组和一个后桥上的201马力马达，在联邦税收优惠之前的起价为39,995美元。第一版的ID.4估计EPA的射程为250英里。
ID.4是该汽车制造商新的ID标签下的第一款将运往美国的车型。这是第二款投产的带有ID徽章的电动汽车。将只在欧洲销售的电动掀背车ID.3是第一款汽车。所有的ID汽车都将拥有相同的底层MEB平台，一个灵活的模块化系统-实际上是一个通用部件矩阵-用于生产电动汽车，大众表示，这将使其更高效、更具成本效益。
下面是这辆车里里外外的近距离观察。下面的照片中有几点需要注意。这是ID.4的最高端版本，称为第一版。这款限量机型起价43,995美元，并有一些额外的润色，比如更大的12英寸触摸屏和修剪颜色。注意门把手下面的照明，中间座位的储物通道，以及一个沿着仪表板运行的照明功能，可以向司机传达各种信息，如电池充电。
note_en:
The unveiling ceremony was virtual, but a few days before TechCrunch got a chance to get an up close view of the vehicle and experience a truly surreal and lonely reveal that only the COVID-19 pandemic could provide.
   The ID.4, which at launch will come with a 82-kilowatt-hour battery pack and a single, 201-horsepower motor on the rear axle, will start at $39,995 before federal tax incentives. The first edition version of the ID.4 has an estimated EPA range of 250 miles.
 The ID.4 is the first under the automaker’s new ID label to be headed to the United States. It’s the second electric vehicle under the ID badge to go into production. The ID.3, the electric hatchback that will only be sold in Europe, is the first vehicle. All of the ID vehicles will have the same underlying MEB platform, a flexible modular system — really a matrix of common parts — for producing electric vehicles that VW says make it more efficient and cost-effective.
  Here’s a closer look at the vehicle inside and out. A few things to note in the photos below. This is the highest end version of the ID.4, called the 1st Edition. This limited run variant will start at $43,995 and comes a few extras touches like a bigger 12-inch touchscreen and trim colors. Notice the lighting under the door handle, the storage pass through in the middle seat and a  lighting feature that runs along the dash and communicates various bits of information, like battery charge, to the driver.

英特尔今天宣布推出为边缘计算场景量身定做的新产品，如数字标牌、交互式售货亭、医疗设备和医疗服务机器人。该芯片制造商表示，第11代英特尔酷睿处理器、Atom x6000E系列、奔腾、赛扬N和J系列为边缘客户带来了新的人工智能安全、功能安全和实时功能，为创新的未来应用奠定了基础。
英特尔预计，到2024年，边缘市场将是一个价值650亿美元的硅片机会。2018年，该公司在该领域的自有收入增长了20%以上，达到95亿美元。根据IDC 2020年的一份报告，高达70%的企业将在三年内在边缘处理数据。到目前为止，英特尔声称已经培育了一个由1200多个合作伙伴组成的生态系统，包括埃森哲、博世、埃克森美孚、飞利浦、威瑞森和ViewSonic，“几乎每个行业”都有超过15,000个最终客户部署。
英特尔表示，第11代酷睿处理器-英特尔在9月初预览-针对需要高速处理、计算机视觉和低延迟确定性处理的物联网(IoT)使用案例进行了增强。与上一代相比，它们在单线程工作负载中带来高达23%的性能提升，在多线程工作负载中带来19%的性能提升，在图形工作负载中带来高达2.95倍的性能提升。新的双视频解码盒允许处理器以1080p每秒高达30帧的速度接收多达40个同步视频流，并输出4通道4K或2通道8K视频。
据英特尔称，与使用CPU模式的上一代处理器相比，第11代的超级进程改进、各种架构增强和英特尔的OpenVINO软件优化相结合，每秒的推论速度提高了50%，而使用处理器的GPU加速模式的推论速度最高可提高90%。(英特尔表示，第11代酷睿i5仅在每款产品的CPU上运行时，每秒的推论速度是第8代酷睿i5-8500的两倍。)。AI推理算法可以在最多96个图形执行单元(INT8)上运行，也可以在内置VNNI的CPU上运行，VNNI是英特尔AVX-512处理器指令集的一部分，用于加速基于卷积神经网络的算法。
至于Atom x6000E系列、奔腾、赛扬N和J系列，英特尔表示，它们是英特尔第一个专门针对物联网进行增强的处理器平台。这四款产品均可提供高达2倍的图形性能、专用的实时卸载引擎、增强的I/O和存储，以及可带来带外和带内远程设备管理的英特尔可编程服务引擎。它们还支持2.5 GbE时间敏感型网络组件和分辨率高达4K、每秒60帧的三台以上显示器，并通过内置的基于硬件的安全性满足基准安全要求。
英特尔表示，它已经有90个合作伙伴承诺提供第11代酷睿解决方案，多达100个合作伙伴锁定了英特尔凌动x6000E系列、英特尔奔腾、赛扬N和J系列。
note_en:
Intel today announced the launch of new products tailored to edge computing scenarios like digital signage, interactive kiosks, medical devices, and health care service robots. The 11th Gen Intel Core Processors, Atom x6000E Series, Pentium, Celeron N, and J Series bring new AI security, functional safety, and real-time capabilities to edge customers, the chipmaker says, laying the groundwork for innovative future applications.
 Intel expects the edge market to be a $65 billion silicon opportunity by 2024. The company’s own revenue in the space grew more than 20% to $9.5 billion in 2018. And according to a 2020 IDC report, up to 70% of all enterprises will process data at the edge within three years. To date, Intel claims to have cultivated an ecosystem of more than 1,200 partners, including Accenture, Bosch, ExxonMobil, Philips, Verizon, and ViewSonic, with over 15,000 end customer deployments across “nearly every industry.”
  The 11th Gen Core processors — which Intel  previewed in early September — are enhanced for internet of things (IoT) use cases requiring high-speed processing, computer vision, and low-latency deterministic processing, the company says. They bring an up to 23% performance gain in single-threaded workloads, a 19% performance gain in multithreaded workloads, and an up to 2.95 times performance gain in graphics workloads versus the previous generation. New dual video decode boxes allow the processors to ingest up to 40 simultaneous video streams at 1080p up to 30 frames per second and output four channels of 4K or two channels of 8K video.
 According to Intel, the combination of the 11th Gen’s  SuperFin process improvements, miscellaneous architectural enhancements, and Intel’s  OpenVINO software optimizations translates to 50% faster inferences per second compared with the previous 8th Gen processor using CPU mode or up to 90% faster inferences using the processors’ GPU-accelerated mode. (Intel says the 11th Gen Core i5 is up to twice as fast in terms of inferences per second as an 8th Gen Core i5-8500 when running on just the CPU in each product.) AI inferencing algorithms can run on up to 96 graphic execution units (INT8) or run on the CPU with VNNI built in, an x86 extension that’s part of Intel’s AVX-512 processor instruction set for accelerating convolutional neural network-based algorithms.
 As for the Atom x6000E Series, Pentium, Celeron N, and J Series, Intel says they represent its first processor platform specifically enhanced for IoT. All four deliver up to 2 times better graphics performance, a dedicated real-time offload engine, enhanced I/O and storage, and the Intel Programmable Services Engine, which brings out-of-band and in-band remote device management. They also support 2.5GbE time-sensitive networking components and resolutions up to 4K at 60 frames per second on upwards of three displays, and they meet baseline safety requirements with built-in hardware-based security.
 Intel says it already has 90 partners committed to delivering 11th Gen Core solutions and up to 100 partners locked in for the Intel Atom x6000E Series, Intel Pentium, Celeron N, and J Series.

title: 英特尔推出第11代CPU，目标是边缘计算，如自助服务亭、医疗设备和机器人，具有更高的安全性和性能
title_en: Intel launches 11th-gen CPUs aimed at edge computing, like kiosks, medical devices, and robots, with improved security and performance
